text.message: What are you expecting me to do here?
red has so much space to expand
wow bro, you just table talked everyone into blocking me entire game
oh wait I'm playing with no rock

but then he has no wood
I only get wood with a 2

Giving stone to red is crazy
i can t let black that sheep port
It doesn't matter he should go for brick port or 3:1 even better
sheep port is his worst choice
Why in getting robbed here now I need to trade for wood again
Robbing the guy that 7 out that is in 3rd, sucks
Fun I’ve lost 10 resources keep kicking me while down
bro goes stealing from only player who's not playing ows
blue on 4 points and 2 devs, oj on 4 points and 3 devs and 2 robbers
and you steal from me xD
I’m in last getting robbed and monoed which is causing me to 7 out
Like your on 7 and he didn’t block you
well he is obviously very close to winning
But I am not not at all
crazy how good you two are doing with no ports
